correction: Replaced spark plugs and cleared fault code
technician_comment: Cylinder 2 misfire found. Spark plug was carbon fouled and worn earlier than expected.

complaint: Check engine light with rough idle
correction: Replaced cylinder 2 plug and ignition coil inspection completed
technician_comment: P0302 active. Plug fouled. Coil test passed. No injector fault observed.
Misfire cylinder 2. Spark plug electrode worn and dark deposits found.

correction: Replaced plug and cleaned throttle body
technician_comment: Repeated rough idle. Cylinder 2 plug fouled. Similar previous cases observed.

correction: Replaced spark plug set and performed fuel trim reset
technician_comment: Repeat VIN. Plug deposits returned. Need engineering review for service interval gap.

correction: Replaced EGR valve and cleaned cooler
technician_comment: P0401 present. EGR valve sticking due to soot buildup. Cooler restriction observed.
EGR actuator command not matching actual position. Soot buildup suspected.

correction: EGR valve replaced, DPF regen completed
technician_comment: High soot accumulation. Needs preventive cleaning interval validation.
P0299 underboost. VGT actuator response slow. Turbo wheel visually OK.
VGT position lag observed. Possible actuator calibration drift.

cause: Left front wheel speed sensor signal erratic
technician_comment: Sensor wire chafing near bracket. ABS fault returned after wet driving.

correction: Replaced wheel speed sensor and rerouted harness
technician_comment: Chafed harness and moisture ingress near sensor connector.

correction: Cleaned DEF doser and replaced nozzle
technician_comment: DEF crystallization found. Doser spray pattern poor.
Doser blocked by crystal deposits. Short route duty cycle suspected.
Catalyst below efficiency. No misfire at time of repair.
